case_title: WINDOW CLEANERS UNION VS PALOMAREZ DAVID

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $25.00 FILED BY WINDOW CLEANERS UNION S.E.I.U LOCAL 44, AFL-CIO AS TO DEFENDANT PALOMAREZ DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
